destinations.evidence: Core state, timing, and replay constraints are enforced against Scheduler parent state.
destinations.snippet: Verifier rejects duplicate in block, missing/non-SCHEDULED call, index >= num_calls, too early/late/expired, and already executed via bitmap.

destinations.evidence: Replay state is pinned to Scheduler storage bitmaps.
destinations.snippet: executedBitmap slot 3 and executedBitmapOverflow slot 4 helpers.

destinations.evidence: Verifier consumes the scheduled constraints for included transactions and due obligations.
destinations.snippet: Block verification calls full scheduled verifier and scheduled censorship check against parent state.

destinations.evidence: Builder path applies matching constraints before execution.
destinations.snippet: Payload builder verifies pooled scheduled transactions and deduplicates (call_id,index).

equivalence_argument: Exact/structural mapping: scheduled call existence/state, timing, index bounds, duplicate/replay, and parent-state backing are implemented in ritual-scheduled-verification and consumed by builder/verifier paths.

related_but_insufficient_code: Dependency repos contain supporting TxScheduled/EVM primitives, but Scheduler state validation is owned by the port.

notes: Mapped in scheduled verification and active builder/verifier consumers.
rationale: The C1-C6/C10 candidates, test-only commits, and slot correction collapse into the current semantic validator: scheduled calls must exist, be in the right state and time window, and not replay in-block or against executed bitmap state.
statement: A scheduled transaction is valid only if its call exists in Scheduler state, is SCHEDULED, has execution_index < numCalls, is included no earlier than startBlock + frequency * execution_index and no later than that execution's TTL deadline or the overall call expiry, and the same (call_id, execution_index) has not appeared earlier in the block and is not marked executed in Scheduler.executedBitmap slot 3 or executedBitmapOverflow slot 4.
suggested_falsification_tests: Build fixtures for missing call, non-SCHEDULED state, out-of-bounds index, too-early execution, per-execution TTL expiry, overall expiry, duplicate pair in one block, executedBitmap bit set under slot 3, and overflow bit set under slot 4; assert each returns the matching scheduled constraint violation.
Assert a scheduled call at expected_block and within expected_block + ttl passes when neither duplicate nor bitmap replay state is present.
summary: Scheduled calls obey state, timing, and replay constraints in the port.
test_or_falsification_candidate: Run verifier matrix for missing call, invalid state, out-of-bounds, too early/late/expired, duplicate, primary/overflow executed bitmaps, and valid in-window case.
title: Scheduled calls obey state, timing, and replay constraints
